spine_metadata.source: TDLR All Licenses (Socrata 7358-krk7), license_type='Water Well Driller/Pump Installer'
spine_metadata.clustering_method: grouped by (business_address_line1 + business_city_state_zip + business_telephone); merged where same physical address has multiple licensees; surnames noted
spine_metadata.license_subtype_legend: W=Driller, P=Pump Installer, M=Monitor Well, K=Closed Loop Geothermal, L=Large Diameter, C=Coring, D=Dewatering, N=Injection, T=Test Hole. Multi-letter = multi-endorsement.

businesses.notes: Two M-endorsement (monitor well) drillers at same address - looks like a small specialty firm. Different surnames - business partnership, not family.

businesses.candidate_legal_name: HEWELL DRILLING / PAULS VALLEY (Hewell, Stevens, Smith cluster)
businesses.notes: Three drillers at one yard - small organized operation. SMITH oldest license, may be founder.
Solo licensee, 6-endorsement (multi-discipline).
License #2939 = very old (1980s issue). 7-endorsement. NO PHONE in license - established small-town shop. Solo. DBA 'DAVE'S WELL SERVICE' on file.
Solo monitor-well driller, NW Austin. Likely environmental/consulting niche.
Office-suite address = professional setup, likely monitor/environmental.
II in name = generational. Rural Hill Country.
Vlasek license #50141 is older - likely founder. Three drillers at one yard. Multi-surname = partnership not family.

businesses.notes: BUSE license #2984 = 1980s vintage. MPW endorsements. Same phone (512-858-4375) used by HYDRO RESOURCES cluster - this may be a multi-yard related operation.

Also Hydro Resources brand suggests multi-jurisdiction industrial scale - not classic mom-and-pop.
Solo, PO Box only (no physical yard listed = home-based?). 210 area code = San Antonio phone but Kerr County biz.
